programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Old partners Aaron Grotjahn and Col Duff reunite on a prospecting mission; the Tunnel Rats race to protect their claim as rival miners close in.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Good weather brings a crowd to the fishing grounds, causing chaos while the bite is hot.

programme.title: A Cut Above
programme.desc: The remaining carvers are left to battle it out in the ultimate chainsaw competition; they must design and create birdhouses then recreate insects on a massive scale.

programme.title: A Cut Above
programme.desc: The competition heats up as carvers start to rack up wins; they must bring their A-game as one tiny mistake could send someone packing.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue
programme.desc: The team scrambles to re-capture an escaped bear; a new volunteer worries about a tiny cub.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue
programme.desc: Volunteers attempt to save three vulnerable moose calves; two cubs battle through a release.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: Zoo staff embark on an ambitious, year-long undertaking in an effort to help Naomi the chimpanzee overcome a complicated medical condition in the hope of finally becoming a mother.

programme.sub-title: Did That Get Your Heart Pumping?
programme.desc: The danger tree crew takes on a climbing job set dangerously close to high-voltage powerlines deep in the rugged Coast Mountains.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo

programme.desc: Unusual calm weather shakes up the competition, forcing captains to rethink their tactics.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Clare puts together a photo shoot to help boost adoption rates; Ilana tries to integrate a new horse with the herd.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Aimee works with a rescue dog who is too scared to leave his room; Danielle and Ilana try to find a friend for a blind rescue horse.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Aimee works with Bibi to get him ready for potential adopters; the staff encourages Danielle to put Marge up for adoption.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: The team travels to a shelter in Miami and Danielle falls in love with a bonded pair facing separation.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Rob and Danielle hope to save some overlooked dogs; a rescue dog can't go to a new home until his owners agree to surrender him.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Rob fights to save 21 pitbulls rescued from an alleged fighting ring; after being abandoned, a rescue dog faces a complicated surgery.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at running Taronga Zoo Sydney, Australia's largest zoo, located on Sydney Harbour's shores.

programme.title: Biggest & Baddest
programme.desc: Niall investigates how small communities and government officials in India are managing conflict with the Indian elephant.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: The Bushmen risk their lives in the fight to get their one-tonne digger down a 20-meter deep mine shaft; new alliances are forged as the Boulder Boys hit pay dirt.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: In Sheepyards, NSW, the Bushmen dodge rock falls in a potentially deadly new mine; the Fire Crew closes in on a brand new deposit of precious black opal.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: After Dr. Keri's ultrasound indicates that the Sheltie, Mimic, is pregnant, the show follows the puppies' progress from birth to four weeks old.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Breeder Kerry Nemet prepares a litter of Shetland Sheepdog puppies for their future lives.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: When a puppy eats a tin can, Dr. Schwartz faces a new challenge; Izzy, a kitten from the Cat Sanctuary, wins the hearts of the RAPS team.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: RAPS quarantines a puppy with a suspected contagious disease; Joey, an abused cat, has his new owner puzzled by patches of missing hair.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: Keeper Caroline notices that Nele's eyes have clouded over and becomes concerned, ordering an examination.

programme.title: Mega Zoo
programme.desc: Keepers become concerned when the big move for lion brothers Lwazi and Ato is delayed; young rhino Kifaru is challenged during a mating ritual; a brilliant plan saves the endangered mountain pygmy possums.

programme.title: Gem Hunters Down Under
programme.desc: Rowan Richardson drills up a lot more than he bargained for; Anthony and Jodie Mifsud desperately try to join tunnels while Old Timers.

programme.title: Gem Hunters Down Under
programme.desc: The Mifsuds hope their two sons will make the difference, but it might cost them a sapphire; Ray and Paul come unstuck with a 40 tonne drill.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Time is the enemy as big fish eat up the quota and paychecks hang in the balance.
